parameters.query:
WITH candidates AS (
  SELECT ra.artifact_id
  FROM raw_artifacts ra
  LEFT JOIN artifact_processing ap
    ON ap.artifact_id = ra.artifact_id
   AND ap.processor = '{{ $json.processor }}'
  WHERE ra.source = 'cars.com'
    AND ra.artifact_type = 'results_page'
    AND ra.error IS NULL
    AND NOT EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM artifact_processing ap_ok
      WHERE ap_ok.artifact_id = ra.artifact_id
        AND ap_ok.status = 'ok'
        AND ap_ok.processor LIKE 'cars_results_page__listings_%'
    )
    AND (
          ap.artifact_id IS NULL
          OR ap.status = 'retry'
          OR (ap.status = 'processing' AND ap.processed_at < now() - interval '20 minutes')
        )
  ORDER BY ra.fetched_at ASC
  LIMIT 1000
),
claimed AS (
  INSERT INTO artifact_processing (artifact_id, processor, status, processed_at)
  SELECT c.artifact_id, '{{ $json.processor }}', 'processing', now()
  FROM candidates c
  ON CONFLICT (artifact_id, processor) DO UPDATE
    SET status = 'processing',
        processed_at = now(),
        message = NULL
  RETURNING artifact_id
)
SELECT ra.*
FROM raw_artifacts ra
JOIN claimed c ON ra.artifact_id = c.artifact_id
ORDER BY ra.fetched_at ASC;

UPDATE artifact_processing
SET
  status = '{{ $node["Send Artifact for Processing"].json.status }}',
  processed_at = now(),
  message = '{{ $node["Send Artifact for Processing"].json.message }}',
  meta = '{{ JSON.stringify($node["Send Artifact for Processing"].json.meta || {}).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb
WHERE artifact_id = {{ $node["Send Artifact for Processing"].json.artifact_id }}
  AND processor = '{{ $node["Send Artifact for Processing"].json.processor }}';

nodes.name: Update Artifacts Table with retry status

parameters.query:
WITH data AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM jsonb_to_recordset('{{ JSON.stringify($json.listings || []).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb)
    AS x(
      listing_id text,
      canonical_detail_url text,
      year int,
      make text,
      model text,
      trim text,

      "stockType" text,
      price int,
      msrp int,
      mileage int,
      vin text,

      "fuelType" text,
      "bodyStyle" text,
      "financingType" text,

      seller_zip text,
      "seller_customerId" text,

      page_number int,
      position_on_page int,
      trid text,
      "isaContext" text
    )
)
INSERT INTO srp_observations (
  artifact_id,
  run_id,
  fetched_at,

  listing_id,
  vin,
  seller_customer_id,

  price,
  msrp,
  mileage,

  year,
  make,
  model,
  trim,
  stock_type,

  fuel_type,
  body_style,
  financing_type,

  seller_zip,

  page_number,
  position_on_page,
  trid,
  isa_context,

  canonical_detail_url
)
SELECT
  {{ $node["Loop Over Items"].json.artifact_id }}::bigint,
  '{{ $node["Loop Over Items"].json.run_id }}'::uuid,
  '{{ $node["Loop Over Items"].json.fetched_at }}'::timestamptz,

  d.listing_id,
  d.vin,
  d."seller_customerId",

  d.price,
  d.msrp,
  d.mileage,

  d.year,
  d.make,
  d.model,
  d.trim,
  d."stockType",

  d."fuelType",
  d."bodyStyle",
  d."financingType",

  d.seller_zip,

  d.page_number,
  d.position_on_page,
  d.trid,
  d."isaContext",

  d.canonical_detail_url
FROM data d
ON CONFLICT (artifact_id, listing_id) DO NOTHING;
